column2: DATA CONNECTIONS — linking officer workbooks into this master (Google Sheets)

column3: Each officer keeps their own Google Sheet workbook. That workbook has a tab called 'MASTER FEED' listing every KPI with a unique Key + live Current / Status / Auto-Flag. This master pulls those values by Key using IMPORTRANGE + VLOOKUP.

1) Upload each officer workbook to Google Drive and open as a Google Sheet.  2) Copy its URL.  3) In the formulas below, replace <OFFICER_URL> with that URL.  4) Paste the formula into the officer's tab here, in the Current Value (H), Status (K) and Auto-Flag (L) columns of each SCHEME/TASK row.  5) The first time, click the cell → 'Allow access' to authorise the link.
Every row in this master carries a hidden Key in column R (e.g. ADCG-001). The officer workbook's MASTER FEED uses the same Keys, so values match even if rows are reordered.
